title: Pulling an All-Nighter to Meet a Deadline

all.en: The client demanded the proposal by nine in the morning, leaving us only one night.
all.zh: 客戶要求早上九點前交出提案，留給我們只有一個晚上。

all.en: We ordered three large pizzas and a dozen cans of coffee to keep going.
all.zh: 我們訂了三個大披薩和一打罐裝咖啡，好讓自己撐下去。

all.en: By midnight, our eyes were red and our jokes were getting strangely funny.
all.zh: 到了午夜，我們眼睛都紅了，講出來的笑話也變得莫名其妙地好笑。

all.en: My colleague kept yawning while editing the financial figures on her laptop.
all.zh: 我的同事一邊在筆電上修改財務數字，一邊不停打哈欠。

all.en: I was responsible for the design slides, which seemed to multiply on their own.
all.zh: 我負責的是設計簡報，那些投影片好像會自己增加。

all.en: At three in the morning, the printer jammed and we nearly lost our minds.
all.zh: 凌晨三點，印表機卡紙，我們差點崩潰。

all.en: We took turns napping for twenty minutes on the office couch.
all.zh: 我們輪流在辦公室沙發上小睡二十分鐘。

all.en: As sunrise lit the window, we finally completed the final version.
all.zh: 當日出的光線照進窗戶時，我們終於完成了最終版本。

all.en: We printed five clean copies and bound them neatly for the meeting.
all.zh: 我們列印了五份乾淨的副本，整齊地裝訂好以備會議使用。

all.en: The client smiled at the result and even praised our creative concept.
all.zh: 客戶對成果露出笑容，甚至稱讚了我們的創意構想。

all.en: We celebrated with breakfast, then went straight home to sleep until evening.
all.zh: 我們以早餐慶祝，然後直接回家一覺睡到傍晚。

all.en: After sleeping deeply for ten hours, I woke up to twenty congratulatory team messages.
all.zh: 在深深熟睡了十個小時後，我醒來看到二十則來自團隊的祝賀訊息。

all.en: Our manager had forwarded the client's praise to everyone in the entire department.
all.zh: 我們的經理把客戶的讚美轉發給了整個部門的每一個人。

all.en: The next afternoon, we held a brief debrief to discuss what had gone right and wrong.
all.zh: 隔天下午，我們開了一個簡短的檢討會，討論哪些做對了、哪些可以改進。

all.en: Everyone agreed that the all-nighter should never become the standard way of working.
all.zh: 大家一致同意，熬通宵不該變成日常的工作模式。

all.en: We listed the warning signs that had caused the schedule to slip earlier in the month.
all.zh: 我們列出了月初造成進度落後的各種警訊。

all.en: My colleague suggested using a shared timeline tool to spot delays before they grow.
all.zh: 同事建議使用共用的時程工具，及早察覺延誤再放大前的徵兆。

all.en: The manager promised to push back harder when clients gave us unreasonable deadlines.
all.zh: 經理承諾以後遇到不合理的截止日期時，會替我們向客戶力爭。

all.en: As a small reward, she let our whole team work from home for the rest of the week.
all.zh: 作為小小的獎勵，她讓整個團隊本週剩下的日子都可以在家工作。

all.en: I used the quiet days to catch up on sleep and to clean my neglected apartment.
all.zh: 我利用那幾天安靜的日子補眠，並打掃了被冷落已久的公寓。

all.en: Looking back, I felt proud of our teamwork but determined to plan more wisely next time.
all.zh: 回頭看，我為團隊合作感到驕傲，也下定決心下次要規劃得更聰明。

all.en: From that month on, our team started planning every project in three clear phases.
all.zh: 從那個月起，我們團隊開始把每個專案分成三個清楚的階段來規劃。

all.en: We blocked the first hour of every Monday to align on priorities and risks.
all.zh: 我們把每週一的第一個小時保留下來，對齊優先事項與風險。

all.en: The shared timeline tool flagged delays early, allowing us to rebalance the workload.
all.zh: 共用的時程工具能及早標示延誤，讓我們重新分配工作量。

all.en: Three months passed without any need for emergency late nights at the office.
all.zh: 三個月過去了，再也沒有需要在辦公室緊急熬夜的情況。

all.en: My colleague used the saved energy to enroll in an evening photography class.
all.zh: 同事用省下的精力報名了一堂晚間攝影課程。

all.en: I started cooking proper dinners again instead of relying on instant noodles.
all.zh: 我重新開始煮像樣的晚餐，不再仰賴泡麵度日。

all.en: Our manager was promoted because the department's productivity had clearly improved.
all.zh: 我們的經理因為部門產能明顯提升而獲得升遷。

all.en: On her last day in our team, she gave each of us a handwritten thank-you card.
all.zh: 在離開我們團隊的最後一天，她給每個人寫了一張手寫感謝卡。

all.en: My card said that I had reminded her why people, not deadlines, build great companies.
all.zh: 我的卡片上寫著，我提醒了她偉大的公司是由人、而非截止日所建立的。

all.en: I taped that card above my desk as a quiet reminder of healthier work habits.
all.zh: 我把那張卡片貼在桌子上方，靜靜提醒自己保持更健康的工作習慣。

all.en: Two years later, my colleague invited me to her first solo photography exhibition.
all.zh: 兩年後，那位同事邀請我參加她的第一場個人攝影展。

all.en: The gallery walls were covered with quiet portraits of office workers leaving on time.
all.zh: 展場牆上掛滿了上班族準時下班的靜謐肖像。

all.en: She told the audience that healthier habits had finally given her the time to create.
all.zh: 她告訴觀眾，是更健康的生活習慣讓她終於有時間從事創作。

all.en: I stood beside her, feeling proud of how far our small team had grown together.
all.zh: 我站在她身旁，為我們小團隊一路成長至此感到驕傲。

all.en: Our former manager arrived late, holding a bouquet of yellow tulips for the artist.
all.zh: 我們前任經理稍晚抵達，手裡捧著一束送給藝術家的黃色鬱金香。

all.en: She had become a senior director, but still remembered every name from our team.
all.zh: 她已升為資深總監，卻仍記得我們團隊裡每一個人的名字。

all.en: We sat together on a bench and reviewed the lessons of that brutal all-nighter.
all.zh: 我們一起坐在長椅上，回顧那次殘酷熬夜所帶給我們的教訓。

all.en: None of us had pulled a single all-nighter at the office since that difficult night.
all.zh: 自從那個艱難的夜晚之後，我們再也沒有人在辦公室熬過通宵。

all.en: On the way home, I bought one of her smaller framed prints for my living room.
all.zh: 回家的路上，我買下她其中一張較小的裱框作品，準備掛在自己的客廳。

all.en: It now hangs beside her handwritten card, reminding me to protect rest above all.
all.zh: 如今那幅作品就掛在她那張手寫卡片旁邊，提醒我把休息看得最重。

all.en: The framed print from her exhibition slowly became the centerpiece of my living room.
all.zh: 來自她畫展的那幅裱框作品，漸漸成為我客廳的視覺焦點。

all.en: Friends often asked about the quiet portraits of office workers leaving on time.
all.zh: 朋友們常常問起那些上班族準時下班的靜謐肖像。

all.en: I always shared the story of that brutal night and the lessons we had learned.
all.zh: 我總會分享那個殘酷夜晚的故事，以及我們從中學到的教訓。

all.en: Years passed, and my own work pace stayed gentle, steady, and intentionally sustainable.
all.zh: 歲月流轉，我自己的工作步調始終保持溫和、穩定，並刻意維持永續的節奏。

all.en: I joined a small consultancy that helped other teams design healthier project schedules.
all.zh: 我加入了一家小型顧問公司，協助其他團隊設計更健康的專案時程。

all.en: My colleague, the photographer, eventually opened a quiet weekend studio of her own.
all.zh: 當年的攝影師同事最終開設了屬於自己的安靜週末工作室。

all.en: Our former manager became a board advisor for a workplace wellness foundation.
all.zh: 我們前任經理成了一個職場健康基金會的董事會顧問。

all.en: The three of us reunited every winter at a quiet riverside inn for two whole days.
all.zh: 我們三人每年冬天都會在一間安靜的河邊旅店重聚兩整天。

all.en: We cooked slow dinners, walked beside the water, and remembered that one hard night.
all.zh: 我們慢慢做晚餐、沿著河邊散步，並回憶起那個艱難的夜晚。

all.en: None of us missed those frantic deadlines, but we treasured what they had taught us.
all.zh: 我們都不留戀那些瘋狂的截止日期，卻珍惜它們所教會我們的一切。

all.en: By our fifth winter reunion, our riverside inn tradition had grown into a cherished annual ritual.
all.zh: 到了第五次冬季團聚時，我們的河畔旅館傳統已經發展成一個珍貴的年度儀式。

all.en: We invited two new guests, both younger colleagues who had once asked us for honest deadline advice.
all.zh: 我們邀請了兩位新客人，都是曾向我們請教過交期忠告的年輕同事。

all.en: They listened to our old stories late into the night, scribbling small notes by the wood-burning stove.
all.zh: 他們聽著我們的舊故事直到深夜，在燒柴的火爐旁悄悄寫下小筆記。

all.en: Our former manager shared updates from the wellness foundation she had been guiding for years.
all.zh: 我們以前的主管分享了她多年來指導的職場健康基金會的最新進展。

all.en: She told us that company-wide burnout had dropped significantly thanks to gentler workload policies.
all.zh: 她告訴我們，公司全面性的職業倦怠因更溫和的工作量政策而大幅下降。

all.en: We toasted with warm cider and quietly thanked her for shaping kinder workplaces for so many people.
all.zh: 我們舉起熱蘋果汁敬她，靜靜地感謝她為這麼多人塑造了更友善的職場。

all.en: On the second day, we walked along the snowy riverside while one of the new guests recorded our conversation.
all.zh: 第二天，我們沿著飄雪的河畔散步，其中一位新客人錄下了我們的對話。

all.en: He later turned the recording into a small podcast episode about healthy professional friendships.
all.zh: 他後來把那段錄音剪成一集小播客，主題是健康的職場友誼。

all.en: The episode reached thousands of listeners and brought heartfelt messages from young workers everywhere.
all.zh: 那集節目觸及了數千位聽眾，並收到來自各地年輕工作者的真摯回饋。

all.en: I returned home certain that one terrible deadline had truly seeded a lifelong garden of meaningful connection.
all.zh: 我回到家時深信，那一次糟糕的交期，真的播下了一座意義深遠的終生連結之花園。
